- If an order includes both a gift card purchase and other merchandise, do the non–gift
  card items earn points?
- For mixed-tender payments (part gift card, part another method), are points awarded
  on the full order or only the non–gift card portion?

# Gift Cards and Reward Points

Orders that buy gift-cards do not earn reward-points. Orders paid with a gift card earn points normally.

[Source: gift_cards.md#gift-cards-and-reward-points]
